name: Banana-Pecan Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Line two 12-cup muffin tins with paper liners.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. Set aside.
4. In another large bowl, mix together the banana, canola oil, and eggs.
5. Gradually add dry ingredients to the banana mixture, alternating with the milk, adding dry ingredients last.
6. Stir in the pecans.
7. Measure out batter evenly into lined muffin cups, filling 7/8 full.
8. Bake for 25 minutes, until muffins are puffed and golden brown.
